decisions.rationale: Observation's base_record_id entity_mta-entity-update-2025 already exists in the registry as the canonical MTA record. The observation resolves to its own base — no different target to link to. MTA logo on presentation title page confirms the entity.

evidence_refs.source_quote: The logo for the Metropolitan Transportation Authority (MTA), featuring the letters 'MTA' in a stylized font inside a circle.

decisions.rationale: Observation's base_record_id entity_nyc-dot already exists in the registry as the canonical NYC DOT record. The observation resolves to its own base — no different target to link to. NYC DOT logo on presentation title page confirms the entity.

evidence_refs.source_quote: The logo for the New York City Department of Transportation (NYC DOT), featuring the words 'NEW YORK CITY' above 'DOT' and a stylized graphic of a road or bridge.

decisions.rationale: Observation's base_record_id entity_mta-bus-company already exists in the registry as the canonical MTA Bus Company record. The observation resolves to its own base — no different target to link to. Record_id encodes a part-of-agency relation to MTA; proposing that as a relation.

proposed_relations.description: MTA Bus Company is a division of the Metropolitan Transportation Authority (MTA).

evidence_refs.source_quote: MTA Bus and DOT develop designs based on today's input
